title: Is 'Working Status' accessible through the API?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would like to change my working status through the api ? Is that possible ? 
  
Thanks, 
Caroline.

posts.author: carolin-skiply (Caroline Bouchat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to change my working status through the api ? Is that possible ?

image765×317 23.8 KB

Thanks,
Caroline.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @carolin-skiply,

Right now this isn’t possible on our current API - however I’ve gone ahead and passed this feedback along internally to our developers to see if it’s something we can support in the future.

If there’s anything else we can help with, please let me know.

-Daniel

posts.author: chitresh (Chitresh Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @daniel
Any update on this? Can we check user’s working status in some way?
Chitresh

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @chitresh!

As of today, it is not possible to access the user’s working status via API.

I have shared the request for it with the team again

Cheers,
Matias
